Test Case Title: Verify login with valid email and valid password should work
Steps to Execute:
1. Navigate to login page
2. Enter valid email & password
3. Click Sign in
Expected Result: User should be redirected to dashboard

Test Case Title: Verify login with valid email and invalid password should fail
Steps to Execute:
1. Enter valid email
2. Enter invalid password
3. Click Sign in

Test Case Title: Verify login with invalid email format should fail
Steps to Execute:
1. Enter invalid email (abc@, test.com)
2. Enter any password
3. Click Sign in

Test Case Title: Verify login with unregistered email should fail
Steps to Execute:
1. Enter unregistered email
2. Enter password
3. Click Sign in

Test Case Title: Verify login with blank email and blank password should fail
Steps to Execute:
1. Keep email and password empty
2. Click Sign in

Test Case Title: Verify login with blank email and valid password should fail
Steps to Execute:
1. Enter password only
2. Click Sign in

Test Case Title: Verify login with valid email and blank password should fail
Steps to Execute:
1. Enter email only
2. Click Sign in

Test Case Title: Verify that password input should be masked
Steps to Execute: 1. Type password in password field

Test Case Title: Verify pressing Enter key should trigger login
Steps to Execute:
1. Enter valid credentials
2. Press Enter

Test Case Title: Verify login should lock account after multiple failed attempts
Steps to Execute:
1. Enter wrong password 5 times
2. Try again

Test Case Title: Verify login session should expire after inactivity
Steps to Execute:
1. Stay idle for 15 mins
2. Try performing action

Test Case Title: Verify logout should terminate session
Steps to Execute:
1. Log in
2. Click Logout
3. Use browser back button
Expected Result: User should not return to dashboard

Test Case Title: Verify login with XSS script in email field should be blocked
Steps to Execute:
1. Enter <script>alert(1)</script> in email
2. Enter password
3. Click Sign in

Test Case Title: Verify login with SQL injection attempt should be blocked
Steps to Execute:
1. Enter ' OR '1'='1 in email
2. Enter any password
3. Click Sign in

Test Case Title: Verify “Forgot Password” link should navigate to reset page
Steps to Execute: 1. Click “Forgot Password?”

Test Case Title: Verify “Remember Me” should persist login after browser restart
Steps to Execute:
1. Check “Remember Me”
2. Login
3. Restart browser

Test Case Title: Verify login without “Remember Me” should not persist session
Steps to Execute:
1. Login without selecting “Remember Me”
2. Restart browser

Test Case Title: Verify “Sign in using SSO” should redirect to SSO flow
Steps to Execute: 1. Click “Sign in using SSO”

Test Case Title: Verify multiple users can log in simultaneously in different browsers
Steps to Execute:
1. Login in Chrome
2. Login in Firefox with same credentials
Expected Result: Both should work (or be restricted if policy enforced)

Test Case Title: Verify login page should load with HTTPS
Steps to Execute: 1. Open login page
Expected Result: URL should show HTTPS with valid SSL

Test Case Title: Verify login page UI elements should be properly aligned
Steps to Execute: 1. Navigate to login page
Expected Result: Fields, buttons, links should align properly

Test Case Title: Verify login with case-sensitive email should behave correctly
Steps to Execute:
1. Enter email with different case (e.g., TEST@abc.com)
2. Enter valid password
Expected Result: Login should work or fail based on case policy

Test Case Title: Verify login with leading/trailing spaces in email should trim input
Steps to Execute:
1. Enter “ test@abc.com ”
2. Enter valid password
Expected Result: Login should succeed after trimming spaces

Test Case Title: Verify login when database is down should show proper error
Steps to Execute:
1. Enter credentials
2. Click Sign in

Test Case Title: Verify login attempt with expired account should fail
Steps to Execute:
1. Enter expired account credentials
2. Click Sign in
